---
title: "Contact"
---

I welcome opportunities for collaboration in social epidemiology, cognitive aging, and health disparities research. If you are interested in working together, please feel free to reach out.

**Email:** [chenruijia@g.ucla.edu](mailto:chenruijia@g.ucla.edu)

You can also find me on:

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ruijia-chen-45bb9a220/)
